name: differenceBy
description: The standalone lodash.differenceBy package as a vendorable file. Useful when you want iteratee-based array difference behavior without an npm dependency.
tagline: Keep values not matched by an iteratee.
summary: This page ships the published lodash.differenceBy file in both raw and normalized forms. The value is to vendor lodash's iteratee-based difference behavior as-is.
nativeAlternative: A custom filter can replicate many cases, but iteratee-based comparison and consistency with existing lodash usage make direct vendoring attractive.

variants.label: Normalized
variants.note: Rule-based normalization for modern TS projects. The goal is easier import and build compatibility, not changed behavior.

variants.label: Raw
variants.note: Published package file kept as-is for older teams or repos that still prefer the original CommonJS distribution.

note: Raw and normalized views are both available. Use normalized when you want an ESM and TypeScript-friendly file, and raw when you want the original published package shape.
